/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libnavigation_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libnavigation_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/navigation_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/navigation_interfaces/msg/spline__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/navigation_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/navigation_interfaces/srv/spline__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/matthew-papesh/dev_ws/src/navigation_interfaces/build/navigation_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libnavigation_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libnav_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libnav_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
